user.title: Add forecast location
user.description: Create a fixed location. You can add one or more precipitation providers afterwards.

data_description.latitude: Defaults to the Home Assistant home latitude.
data_description.longitude: Defaults to the Home Assistant home longitude.

reconfigure.title: Update forecast location
reconfigure.description: Changing the coordinates updates every provider configured for this location.

abort.unique_id_mismatch: The location identity does not match the entry being reconfigured.

user.title: Add precipitation provider
user.description: Choose the source for this location.

buienradar.title: Configure Buienradar
buienradar.description: Buienradar normally supplies approximately two hours of five-minute forecasts.

buienalarm.title: Configure Buienalarm
buienalarm.description: Warning: this provider uses an undocumented endpoint. It can change, block access or stop working without notice.

knmi.title: Configure KNMI
knmi.description: KNMI uses the experimental seamless ensemble dataset. Create a free personal Open Data API key on the KNMI Data Platform.

open_meteo.title: Configure Open-Meteo
open_meteo.description: The free API is intended for non-commercial use and requires attribution.

reconfigure.title: Update precipitation provider
reconfigure.description: Update credentials or the provider-safe polling interval. Experimental endpoints can change without notice.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the provider.
error.invalid_data: The provider returned an unsupported or invalid response.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while validating the provider.

abort.all_providers_configured: All supported providers are already configured for this location.
abort.unknown: The provider flow lost its selected provider.
